projectDescription: A high-impact, immersive Next.js 16 landing page template featuring interactive 3D models, GPU-optimized animations, a multi-theme system with light/dark/colorblind modes, and six interchangeable accent colors.
keyFeatures: Multi-theme system with Light, Dark, and Colorblind modes switchable at runtime
Six interchangeable accent colors (Orange, Blue, Green, Violet, Rose, Yellow)
Semantic CSS token architecture for consistent visual design across all modes
Interactive 3D models embedded via Spline with real-time browser rendering
GPU-optimized animations using Motion (Framer Motion) with composited properties only
Interactive WebGL globe with COBE and SVG wireframe globe with D3.js + TopoJSON
Animated bento grid, 3D perspective cards, logo carousels, and auto-play testimonials
Next.js 16 with Turbopack, React 19, and App Router for extreme performance
publicApiSurface: HeroSection — hero with Spline 3D scene and animated CTA buttons
BentoCaracteristicas — bento grid with COBE globe and floating image cards
EstadoAgentes — animated 4-quadrant cross grid with status indicators
Pricing — interactive pricing table with monthly/yearly toggle and plan selection
TestimonialsCarousel — auto-play testimonials carousel with Embla
Header — sticky header with ThemeSwitcher (theme + color picker)
ThemeSwitcher — mode cycle button + color select dropdown
AcercaDe — animated timeline component for the About page
ContactWithGlobe — contact page with SVG wireframe globe
GalleryHoverCarousel — hover-activated floating gallery for the Work page
